creator: craig@yekse.gank.org
text:
I talked to Jack about this previously and indicated that I didn't have
time to maintain the development version of audacity but have no
objection if someone else wants to add it.

Assuming this shar passes all the usual ports QA standards, it's fine by
me.

Craig

On Thu, Sep 14, 2006 at 08:57:51PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of audio/audacity,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/103260 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/103260
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
